heroEyebrow: Dental implant systems and surgical kits
heroTitle: A reliable solution for modern medicine.
heroText: SARMED is the official IDI representative in Armenia. We supply implant systems, surgical kits and restorative components for clinics that need a trusted brand, predictable clinical protocols and reliable local support.
heroPoint1: Official IDI solutions for everyday surgical and restorative practice.
heroPoint2: Supply, guidance and responsive support for clinics, doctors and procurement teams in Armenia.
heroPoint3: Products and materials that help teams move faster from system selection to patient treatment.
heroClinicalText: A clear selection system - from the clinical case to the final solution.
heroFlowLabel: Clear selection logic - from the task to the system.
heroFlow1Text: We analyze the clinical situation and treatment goals.
heroFlow2Text: We choose the optimal components for the task.
heroFlow3Text: We combine everything into a reliable and predictable solution.
heroFlow4Text: A stable and precise result for the doctor and the patient.
heroContactModalLead: Choose the most convenient way to reach us using the current contacts from the website.
heroContactPhoneText: Primary contact for a quick response
expertiseCard1Text: Implants, surgical kits and prosthetic components grouped around real treatment workflows.
expertiseCard2Text: Product pages include brochures, videos and technical references that support decision making.
expertiseCard3Text: A direct contact point for clinics and specialists in Armenia who need responsive support.
brandLead: IDI, Implants Diffusion International, is a French manufacturer and distributor network focused on oral implantology.
brandBody1: The company has been designing and manufacturing dental implants since 1987 and develops its products in permanent collaboration with researchers, engineers and dental surgeons.
brandBody2: IDI invests in in-house research and development, manufactures in France, publishes scientific materials and collaborates with dental professionals from more than 30 countries.
brandFact1Text: IDI designs and manufactures dental implants with several decades of experience in implantology.
brandFact2Text: The company develops and manufactures in France, supporting traceability and production control.
brandFact3Text: IDI maintains a long-term R&D focus using simulation, 3D imaging and high-technology equipment to create new products.
brandFact4Text: The company actively cooperates with dental practitioners and implantologists from over 30 countries.
